comments.body:
WOOT!
LGTM
I think we ought to let @mtrmac have the honor of merging this one. Nice work All!
Hate to ask, but should this be respun to get the man page PR that just went in?
Well that is a minor change, but I will let @mtrmac decide.

I think having the `login`/`logout` references in the man page would be useful when it’s one of the major new features of this release.

But if we are in a hurry, it’s not critical.
Ok lets get the Man page/README fix in and then I will rebase on Monday.  But we do want to get this out by Monday.
